text: OpenCode/opencode and VS Codium are not claimed as native without discovery evidence.
evidence_required: adapter decision report with support tier and discovery evidence

text: Adapter targets define a concrete adapter artifact before support is claimed.
evidence_required: adapter artifact contract such as AGENTS.md projection or manual import path

text: A smoke test is required to prove the runtime reads the adapter.
evidence_required: planned or executed adapter smoke command with expected observable result

text: Unproven targets are excluded from public support claims.
evidence_required: release support matrix with unsupported_for_release or adapter_needed status
